across.clue: If something is ___, it happens all around the world.
A person cannot change their fundamental character, nature, or habits, no matter how hard they try | a ___ can't change its spots
To add ___ to a drink or liquid in order to make it less strong; to dilute. | ___ down
A ___ is a large area of land usually based on some common feature.
___ is rudeness or behavior that shows a lack of respect.
if water floods a place it covers it.
To show that there is a good reason for something especially something that other people think is wrong.
to deliberately become involved in a situation and try to influence the way that it develops although you have no right to do this
To ___ is to be dishonest in order to win or do well.
If something is ___, there are many of those things.
a serious lack of food that continues for a long time and causes many people in a country to become ill or die.

down.clue: A ___ is a regular publication with news, stories, and articles.
to begin to relax after you have been working hard or feeling nervous
To ___ means to symbolize or represent something.
___ means relating to art or artists.
a relative of a person who lived in the past
If plants or animals are ___, there are none left.
to give up something important or valuable so that you or other people can do or have something else
intended to last or perform an activity only until someone or something permanent or final is available.
